text: I'll start by exploring the codebase structure and gathering data in parallel.

tool_uses.name: Agent
tool_uses.input:
{"description": "Explore codebase structure", "subagent_type": "Explore", "prompt": "Explore the Rust codebase at /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust/. I need:
1. All Cargo.toml files - read their contents (especially [package] name and [dependencies] sections)
2. All .rs source files and their paths
3. All test files or test modules

Be thorough - list every .rs file path and read all Cargo.toml files completely."}

tool_uses.name: Bash
tool_uses.input: {"command": "cd /Users/gladyscavero/Documents/PEOPL/GitHub/claw-code/rust && cargo test --workspace 2>&1", "description": "Run cargo test to get test output", "timeout": 120000}
